entries.speaker: brenn
lines: Maren was the brilliant one. I was the other one. You
know — every generation has a Maren and a Brenn. Nobody remembers
the Brenn.

entries.speaker: sable
lines: She came through here?

entries.speaker: brenn
lines: Two weeks ago. Left a message. Sealed, warded, very
dramatic. Typical Maren.

entries.speaker: brenn
lines: I didn't read it, if that's what you're wondering.
She'd know if I had.

entries.speaker: brenn
lines: There's a tracker who can guide you the rest of the
way. Riven. Runs alone in the deep places. Tell him Brenn sent
you. He'll pretend he doesn't know me, but he'll help.

entries.speaker: riven
lines: I know who you're looking for. I know where she went.
The question is whether I lead you there or let you get lost and
die.

entries.speaker: sable
lines: Brenn sent us.

entries.speaker: riven
lines: Brenn is a fool who lives in a lean-to and talks to
mushrooms. But he's a correct fool. This way.

entries.speaker: archivist
lines: You are the sixth group to reach this chamber in
eleven thousand years. The previous five asked the same question.
The answer has not changed.

entries.speaker: sable
lines: Friendly place.

entries.speaker: maren
lines: It's not friendly. It's accurate. There's a
difference.

entries.speaker: maren
lines: I found it. The pattern. The Pallor has been doing
this for ages — literally. Every cycle, a door opens. Every
cycle, someone is marked as its host. And every cycle, someone
has to close the door from the inside.

entries.speaker: sable
lines: From the inside.

entries.speaker: maren
lines: The hinge only turns one way.

entries.speaker: maren
lines: Ask it. Go ahead.

entries.speaker: archivist
lines: The door closes from the inside. The one who
closes it does not return. This is not a curse. It is a
mechanical fact.

entries.speaker: maren
lines: Every previous cycle, the knowledge was lost. The
next age started from nothing. That's why it keeps happening —
nobody remembers how it ended.

entries.speaker: maren
lines: Not this time. I'm going to make sure the world
remembers.
